es.title: Video: Oídos
es.description: ¿Cómo percibes los sonidos? Mira este video para ver qué pasa dentro de tus oídos.

en.title: How Do the Ears Work? (Video)
en.description: Sounds are everywhere, and you have two cool parts on your body that let you hear them all: your ears! So how do you hear? Watch this video to step inside an ear.
